mapper.select: select * from ncs_status where drill_id=#{drill_id} and student_id in (select sid from ncs_student where course_id=#{cid})
select status from ncs_status where student_id=#{sid} and drill_id=#{drill_id}
select count(*) from ncs_status where student_id=#{sid} and drill_id=#{drill_id}
mapper.update: update ncs_status set status=#{status} where student_id=#{sid} and drill_id=#{eid}
